Home/Resources/Grants + funding

Grants + funding

Find money, help, or a better first referral.

This page gathers funding routes for startups, nonprofits, artists, creators, community programs, rural businesses, tourism projects, and creative-economy work. Check current eligibility, deadlines, and contact paths before applying or promising support.

Browse funding sources Submit a funding update

How to use this page

Start with fit before chasing a deadline.

Business or startup

Look for SBDC, SBA, rural business, loan, tax-credit, and economic-development routes.

Nonprofit or community program

Look for local foundations, community grants, fiscal-sponsor paths, and public-benefit programs.

Artist or creative project

Look for arts councils, creative industries, public-art, cultural heritage, and artist-support routes.

Building, venue, or district

Look for revitalization, facade, historic preservation, commercial-space, and tourism-development programs.

Funding source shortcuts

Open these sources before building a list from scratch.

Rates, deadlines, eligibility, and application windows change. Use the source page as the authority.

Search the rows in this section.

ColfaxStartup / economic-development Resource directory

City of Raton Economic Development Programs

Raton and Colfax startup paths, SBA/SBDC/SCORE/FastTrac links, GrowRaton, Raton MainStreet, and related support routes.

Use when someone needs a first route into business support rather than a single directory listing.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxBusiness support

City of Raton Local Business Support

Hands-on startup help, SBA, SBDC, GrowRaton, Raton MainStreet, SCORE, and city support paths.

Use when a new venture needs the first phone call or support form.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxArts organization grants

New Mexico Arts Grants

New Mexico nonprofits and government entities supporting arts education, arts economic development, performing arts, visual arts, media arts, literary arts, and folk arts.

Use for Colfax County arts nonprofits, cultural organizations, and fiscally sponsored public arts activities.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxBusiness funding directory

New Mexico Business Portal Financial Assistance

New Mexico entrepreneurs comparing SBA funding programs, state finance options, and business assistance paths.

Use as a plain-language first stop before moving into SBA, NMFA, JTIP, LEDA, or local economic-development contacts.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxCreative business / organization grants

New Mexico Creative Industries Division Grants

New Mexico creative businesses, nonprofits, public agencies, and legal entities watching creative-industry grant and pre-application opportunities.

Use for Colfax creative-economy projects, but verify whether the current phase is a grant application, pre-application, or future funding notice.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxCommercial development loans

New Mexico Finance Authority Opportunity Enterprise

New Mexico commercial-building, renovation, and development projects that increase usable business space.

Use when a project is about commercial space, adaptive reuse, or business-location infrastructure rather than operating cash.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxSmall business capital access

New Mexico Finance Authority SSBCI

New Mexico small businesses seeking capital through lender partnerships, loan participation, or capital access programs.

Use with a participating lender or SBDC advisor when a business is viable but needs a capital structure that lowers lender risk.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxWorkforce training reimbursement

New Mexico Job Training Incentive Program

New Mexico expanding or relocating businesses creating new jobs and needing wage/training reimbursement support.

Use before hiring for an expansion plan; verify eligible jobs, wages, and timing before making hiring promises.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxEconomic-development incentive / state program

New Mexico Local Economic Development Act

New Mexico communities and qualifying economic-development projects, including Colfax County and several local municipalities.

Use for larger business-expansion or project-support questions; verify eligibility with the state and local government before advising.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxCommunity resource directory

SHARE New Mexico

New Mexico community resources, program locations, county pages, and grants/funding discovery.

Use for social-service, nonprofit, and community program referrals.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

ColfaxStartup / small business loans

WESST Lending

New Mexico startups and existing small businesses seeking microloans, consulting, and training support.

Use for Colfax entrepreneurs who may not fit traditional bank lending and need technical assistance with financing.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

HuerfanoEconomic development

Huerfano County Economic Development Support & Incentives

Rural Jump Start, HUBZone, enterprise zone, SBDC, SCEDD, Wheelhouse, workforce, tourism, and incentive context.

Use when a business is considering startup, relocation, expansion, or incentives in Huerfano.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

HuerfanoLocal foundation / community projects

Spanish Peaks Community Foundation

Huerfano County local projects, artists, tradition-keepers, small nonprofits, gathering spaces, and cultural stewardship efforts.

Use as a local funding and civic-support lead, then verify whether a given project fits current foundation priorities.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasLocal nonprofit grants

Bar NI Community Fund

Purgatoire Valley 501(c)(3) nonprofits and service organizations seeking project support in youth development, education, environment, health, human services, civic work, and public benefit.

Use for Trinidad-area nonprofit projects, then verify the current spring or fall cycle before promising a deadline.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasFunding

City of Trinidad Grants

Grant notices for nonprofits and community-serving organizations.

Use for local funding checks before searching statewide grant lists.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasNonprofit directory

Southern Colorado Community Foundation Nonprofit Directory

Southern Colorado nonprofit search, grantseeker pathways, and volunteer profile discovery.

Use for Colorado nonprofit discovery before building a manual organization list.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasLocal foundation / grantmaker

Trinidad Community Foundation

Las Animas County nonprofit and public-benefit projects seeking local foundation context or grantmaker contact information.

Use alongside the City of Trinidad grants page; confirm current application instructions before promising deadlines or eligibility.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasLocal nonprofit grants

Trinidad Community Foundation Grant Process

Colorado nonprofits, public entities, nonprofit schools, and fiscally sponsored charitable/civic/educational work tied to Trinidad grant processes.

Use for Trinidad-area nonprofit projects and confirm the current city/foundation process before applying.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalArts / civic grants

Arts in Society Grant

Colorado artists, arts organizations, schools, governments, and cross-sector projects using art to address civic or social challenges.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano arts/community projects that have a clear public benefit and partnership frame.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalStartup / innovation grants

Colorado Advanced Industries Accelerator Programs

Colorado startups, researchers, and technology companies commercializing products in advanced industries.

Use when a growth business needs research, commercialization, export, or early-stage capital support; pair with SBDC help before applying.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalBusiness funding directory

Colorado Business Funding and Incentives

Colorado businesses comparing tax credits, grants, loans, rural incentives, and job-creation programs.

Use as the Colorado starting page before drilling into Rural Jump-Start, enterprise zone, or industry-specific programs.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalCreative district / main street funding

Colorado Community Revitalization Grant

Creative districts, historic districts, main streets, and neighborhood commercial-center projects needing gap funding.

Use for venue, corridor, downtown, arts-district, or adaptive-reuse ideas in Colorado communities; verify open cycles first.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalArts organization grants

Colorado Creates Grant

Colorado nonprofit arts organizations and public arts programs seeking annual competitive support for arts programs, services, and activities.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano arts nonprofits, galleries with nonprofit partners, and community arts programming.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalCreative economy support

Colorado Creative Industries

Colorado arts, creative industries, promotion, resources, and funding opportunities.

Use for artists, galleries, makers, and creative nonprofits in Las Animas and Huerfano.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalStartup incentive / rural grant

Colorado Rural Jump-Start Program

New or relocating businesses considering eligible rural Colorado zones, including tax benefits and possible matching grants.

Use for Huerfano or Las Animas startup/relocation questions, then verify zone eligibility and job-creation requirements with OEDIT.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalSBDC

Colorado SBDC Network

Colorado small-business advising, training, startup help, expansion help, and certifications.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano businesses needing technical assistance.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalCultural heritage grants

Folk and Traditional Arts Project Grant

Colorado projects that celebrate, document, or preserve folk and traditional arts and cultural heritage.

Use for culture-bearers, local history/heritage groups, arts nonprofits, and community documentation projects.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalColorado nonprofit capital grants

Gates Family Foundation Capital Grants

Colorado nonprofits and community organizations with capital projects such as buildings, renovation, land, parks, arts/culture spaces, or civic infrastructure.

Use for larger place-based projects after the organization has a real capital plan, board support, and matching/funding strategy.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalFederal grant search

Grants.gov

Federal grant searches for nonprofits, public agencies, educational institutions, and eligible organizations.

Use after clarifying the applicant type and project purpose; pair with SBDC, nonprofit, or grant-writing help before applying.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalHistoric preservation grants

History Colorado State Historical Fund

Colorado historic preservation, archaeology, education, and planning projects tied to significant places or cultural resources.

Use for historic buildings, museums, downtown preservation, heritage tourism, and cultural-resource projects in Las Animas or Huerfano.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalEconomic-development resource directory

NM EDD Business Resource Map

Finding and submitting New Mexico business-support resources, funding assistance, services, and regional economic-development contacts.

Use this alongside city and chamber resources when a Colfax user needs a statewide business-support path or a resource needs to be submitted for review.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalFederal arts grants

National Endowment for the Arts Grants

Arts nonprofits and eligible organizations seeking federal project support, including small-organization arts access opportunities.

Use for stronger nonprofit arts projects with clear public outcomes; verify the specific NEA program, deadline, and eligibility each cycle.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalSBDC

New Mexico Small Business Development Center

No-cost counseling and training for New Mexico entrepreneurs and small businesses.

Use as the default first stop for New Mexico startup and growth questions.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalSmall business loans / capital

SBA Funding Programs

Small businesses comparing SBA-backed loans, investment capital, disaster assistance, surety bonds, and lender matching.

Use when a startup or existing business needs financing but should compare loans, grants, and counseling before applying.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalSmall business lender matching

SBA Lender Match

Small businesses looking for SBA-approved lenders and competitive loan options.

Use after estimating the amount, purpose, repayment plan, and documents needed for a loan conversation.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalFederal business support

SBA SBDC Finder

Finding SBDC counseling and training by ZIP code.

Use when a user is unsure which SBDC office covers them.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalNonprofit grants

Southern Colorado Community Foundation Grants

Eligible nonprofits serving southeastern Colorado counties, including Huerfano and Las Animas.

Use for community-serving nonprofit projects, then verify available funds, award range, service area, and the March/September cycle.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalScholarship

Southern Colorado Community Foundation Scholarship

Eligible high-school girls golf team members in several southern Colorado counties, including Huerfano and Las Animas, seeking college or vocational support.

Use as a regional scholarship lead; verify eligibility and deadline before sharing with students or families.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalRural funding

USDA Rural Business Development Grants

Rural business development planning, technical assistance, and small/emerging business expansion support.

Use for rural-capacity projects and business-support organizations.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalRural microbusiness loans / grants

USDA Rural Microentrepreneur Assistance Program

Microenterprise development organizations that provide technical assistance and microloans to rural entrepreneurs and small businesses.

Use for nonprofit/lender/intermediary partners serving rural microbusinesses; individual businesses usually work through an eligible intermediary.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalAgriculture / producer grants

USDA Value-Added Producer Grants

Agricultural producers, producer groups, farmer/rancher cooperatives, and producer-owned businesses developing value-added products or markets.

Use for farms, ranches, food businesses, and producer-led ventures that need planning or working-capital support.

Details can change. Open the page before spending money or announcing placement.

Funding-related entries

Local and regional funding entries from the resource directory.

Some entries are broad support routes rather than direct grant programs. Open the page or ask the listed organization what fits your project.

Search the rows in this section.

Taos Community Foundation

Angel Fire, Colfax, NMVisitor-facing listingAll tourism directory listings

Public travel or tourism listing. Check current details with the listed page or business before outreach, publication, printing, or promising placement.

Open page

Colfax County, NM Raton, Springer, Angel Fire, Cimarron, Eagle Nest, Maxwell & Ute Park

Raton, Colfax, NMFundingCounty-Specific Resources Overview

Lodging or hospitality business in Raton, Colfax, NM. It is useful for visitor referrals, event guest planning, trip-planning pages, and questions about guest-facing information channels.

Open page

Continental Loans

Raton, Colfax, NMLocal resourceLocal business listing

Funding or business-support route in Raton, Colfax, NM. Use it to find program pages, eligibility details, deadlines, and the office or organization that should confirm the next step.

Open page

First National Loan Production Office

Raton, Colfax, NMLocal resourceLocal business listing

Funding or business-support route in Raton, Colfax, NM. Use it to find program pages, eligibility details, deadlines, and the office or organization that should confirm the next step.

Open page

GrowRaton & Raton MainStreet

Raton, Colfax, NMFundingTraining & Technical Assistance

Funding or business-support route in Raton, Colfax, NM. It is most useful when researching assistance, referrals, eligibility questions, or preparation steps before applying.

Funding or business-support route in Raton, Colfax, NM. It is most useful when researching assistance, referrals, eligibility questions, or preparation steps before applying.

Small Business Development Center - Las Vegas (NM)

Raton, Colfax, NMTrainingOne-on-one advising, business plan development and training; serves Raton, Mora, Santa Rosa, Pecos, Angel Fire and Eagle Nest.

Lodging or hospitality business in Raton, Colfax, NM. It is most useful when researching assistance, referrals, eligibility questions, or preparation steps before applying.

Huerfano, COFundingSmall-business advising, workshops and access to capital assistance.

Shop or local retail business in Huerfano, CO. It is most useful when researching assistance, referrals, eligibility questions, or preparation steps before applying.

Huerfano County Economic Development

Huerfano, COResourceEconomic development; Site readiness, downtown revitalisation, business recruitment and local economic development.

Funding or business-support route in Huerfano, CO. Use it to find program pages, eligibility details, deadlines, and the office or organization that should confirm the next step.

Open page

Southern Colorado Economic Development District (SCEDD)

Huerfano, COFundingGrant and loan funding assistance, CEDS preparation, economic development planning and technical support.

Funding or business-support route in Huerfano, CO. It is most useful when researching assistance, referrals, eligibility questions, or preparation steps before applying.

Send an update

Huajatolla Heritage Foundation

La Veta, Huerfano, COHeritage / CreativeHeritage / culture organization

Creative-directory listings added from a public local arts, tourism, chamber, creative-district, or maker directory. Open the page and confirm current hours, contact route, listing status, submission path, and...

Open page

La Veta Creative District Aid for Artists

La Veta, Huerfano, COGrant / funding resourceArtist funding and emergency-resource list

La Veta Creative District artist-aid page points creatives toward grants, relief, and support resources. Check current program status because some relief funds or deadlines may have changed.

Open page

Huerfano County, CO Walsenburg, La Veta, Gardner & unincorporated communities

Walsenburg, Huerfano, COFundingCounty-Specific Resources Overview

Lodging or hospitality business in Walsenburg, Huerfano, CO. It is useful for visitor referrals, event guest planning, trip-planning pages, and questions about guest-facing information channels.

Open page

CREATE Trinidad Campaigns and Registration Portal

Trinidad, Las Animas, COGrant / registration portalCreative grant, ticketing, sponsorship, and volunteer portal

CREATE Trinidad portal lists current campaigns, including Creative Impact Grants and GET LIT ticketing when active. Dates, eligibility, ticketing, sponsorship, and grant requirements are time-sensitive and must be...

Open page

City of Trinidad Grants Page

Trinidad, Las Animas, COFundingLocal grants and nonprofit funding routes

City grants page references Las Animas nonprofit grant history, Bar NI Community Service Fund, and Trinidad Community Foundation grant process. Dates and cycles may change; Check current application windows before...

Open page

Las Animas County, CO Trinidad, Aguilar, Branson, Cokedale, Kim, Starkville & unincorporated communities

Trinidad, Las Animas, COFundingCounty-Specific Resources Overview

Lodging or hospitality business in Trinidad, Las Animas, CO. It is useful for visitor referrals, event guest planning, trip-planning pages, and questions about guest-facing information channels.

Open page

Arts in Society Colorado Grant

Regional, Regional, COGrant / funding resourceColorado artist and nonprofit grant

Colorado grant program for nonprofits, individuals, and eligible partners. Confirm cycle status, eligibility, and application requirements before sharing as an active opportunity.

Open page

Creative Industries Division Grant Portal

Regional, Regional, NMGrant application portalCreative grants portal

Portal only shows grant programs currently accepting applications. Check the CID grants page for program details before applying.

Open page

Creative New Mexico

Regional, Regional, NMCreative support organizationStatewide creative advocacy and resource organization

Statewide organization connecting, promoting, and advocating for creative individuals, organizations, industries, and communities. Confirm current programs, workshops, grant links, and membership paths.

Immediate directory

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update paths.

Results update after submitting the form or after a short pause while typing. Press Escape to close this panel.

Open resource directorySubmit a correction

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
